feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: angels wouldn't help you.
entry.summary:
Author: dylaesthetics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,700Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 60

Summary: Buck thought he knew what rock bottom felt like already. Between a lightning strike, a belated dead brother acquisition, a thirty-thousand pound vehicle crushing his leg, and a goddamn tsunami, he figured he’s experienced all life has to offer.Turns out, he’d been achingly wrong.Because here he is, lonely and left behind, at three in the morning and four beers down, purchasing a ticket to a queer speed-dating event. Not just any regular ticket. No. A whole weekend getaway, the premium pack with a fancy restaurant booking and SPA included.This. This is rock bottom.______OR in the wake of Eddie moving to El Paso, the Fallen Angel of Coquette curses Buck, forcing him to revisit memories from his past.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: drunk on your vine (wine?)
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,886Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Eddie has finally excepted that he is gay and in love with his best friend, but he has absolutely no idea how to tell him. Luckily for him, Maddie, Karen, Athena and Hen are willing to help him. Who would have thought that mixing alcohol and love confessions could get so out of control. Or, the chaotic shenanigans of wine night.

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,370Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 277

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: Rain On Me
entry.summary:
Author: Howlingwolf27

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,918Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 298

Summary: Buck finds out that Eddie is street fighting and he is not impressed and he goes and confronts him and by doing so sets a motion of events in place. Can Buck and Eddie find their way to each other and what happens when a certain officer Reagan comes in to the picture.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,951Chapters: 10/365Kudos: 32

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: “You have to say yes!”
entry.summary:
Author: Ju5tAnoth3rN3rd

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,385Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: Short based off another twitter post I saw. This time from Firefightrsgobr.Fun fact: I commented on their post "Give me a few minutes", wrote 2 (two) lines, and then immediately passed tf out...So, like usual, it's late but its hereeeee. Enjoy!-Translation at the end for the brief español in this chapter.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,650Chapters: 13/24Kudos: 422

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: 9-1-1 Season 9 Episode 11 "Going Once Going Twice" Extention of the Eddie & Abigail Ending-Montage Scene
entry.summary:
Author: Juli_Christin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 773Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Eddie Diaz would never just let an 18 year old kid go on her way across the country with no direction or destination, so he arranges for Abigail to move in with his sister Adriana who desparately needs a new roommate.(This is just gonna be a one-shot for now, I'll see if I'll get the inspiration to add more chapters)

entry.title: The last great american dynasty
entry.summary:
Author: starkgrande

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,405Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 133

Summary: Evan Buckley was a firefighter with the 118 until a truck bombing forced him to stop.When at rock bottom,he turned to music and gained fame fast.Eddie Diaz, an ex Army medic and new firefighter at the 118, is a fan of Evan Buckley. word count is low as its mostly images of texts and tweets but will have more words as the story continues

entry.title: I always do
entry.summary:
Author: sunflowerbythebay

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,266Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 133

Summary: “E-Eds, you’re okay, you’re awake!” “Buck? Wha-what is going on?” Eddie stumbles on his words as he tries to figure out what was happening. He was just in an elevator after getting shot, so what the hell happened? “It’s okay, I got you, you’re gonna be ok” or Buck finds Eddie in the elevator after he gets shot.

entry.title: Can't Lose What You Never Had
entry.summary:
Author: bright_was_here

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,195Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: In the aftermath of Conner and Kameron's deaths, Buck finds out he was written into their will to take Theo. However, due to the way the will was written, the family demands a paternity test. Only then do we find out that Theo was Conner's after all. Buck is left reeling to learn there was one more thing he just couldn't get right.

entry.title: *knock, knock*
entry.summary:
Author: Knzy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,224Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 102

Summary: “Officer, what’s going on?” “Christopher here was caught skipping school with a few of his friends. A few of those friends decided that it would be a good idea to go to the mall and shoplift from one of the stores. He was searched and we didn’t find anything on him, but his friends were taken into custody so I offered to give him a ride home.” Or Chris gets in trouble leading to Buddie Cannon

entry.title: Leave Me Alone, Punk
entry.summary:
Author: MaskedmenMaruaders

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,038Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 72

Summary: "Buck." Eddie repeated, shocked by how easily it rolled off his tongue. "Strange name." "Y- Yeah, I get that a lot." "Suits you." Buck's eyes widened in surprise and Eddie swore he heard his breath hitch. "Thanks." Buck mumbled, rubbing the back of his neck as blush crept in. "But I should go- Class and all that. Uh, enjoy. Or don't. I gotta go." Eddie watched him leave, standing in the same spot he'd first seen Buck and left with more questions than answers. OR Buddie age gap fic.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Next Question
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,555Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 165

Summary: Buck beat him to the punch. "You know what? Okay, alright, fine. You wanna know, I'll tell you. I graduated high school at sixteen and left Pennsylvania immediately after, in Jeep that wasn't mine with $137, a duffel full of clothes, two blankets, and half a case of water. Spent a couple years traveling until I was sick of sleeping in my car." "You lived out of your car?" Hen asked, a familiar maternal concern in her tone. Buck's eyebrows furrowed in the clearest display of emotion since they started asking questions. "I left home at sixteen in a borrowed Jeep, what'd you think I was checking into the Ritz at night? Is that your question?"

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Elevator, straight to the top floor
entry.summary:
Author: RyRo_224

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,284Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 128

Summary: “Can I tell you something?” Eddie says softly, Buck nods, “Anything, Eds.” “I’m really happy you found Theo. But, it kills me because when I look at him all I see is you.” “What?” “I used to think you and Chris looked so similar. Sometimes I would forget you weren’t related. But I could still pretend. Pretend that Chris is yours too. But then I saw Theo. He is yours. Chris isn’t.”   OR Season 9x18 Buck and Eddie stuck in an elevator after Eddie gets hurt?!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Fourth Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: Vowelwrites

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,063Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: don’t look too close at the timelines ok pls and thank you! also i know very little about the legal system regarding this so my apologies for any and all inaccuracies 16 years ago Amanda Edwards and Peter Edwards decided they wanted to have a baby. Due to circumstances out of their control, they were unable to conceive themselves. At this time Margaret and Phillip Buckley— distant friends of Amanda and Peter— found out they were expecting another child. Evan ‘Buck’ Buckley had left by then meaning that neither him nor Maddie would have known. Unknown to either sibling, the Buckleys had a healthy baby girl that they gave to the Edwards family and forged adoption papers.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
